questions.question: Radiology (Q001): A clinical concept related to chest X‑ray interpretation is assessed. Which option is MOST accurate?
questions.option_a: Finding typical of a different condition than chest X‑ray interpretation
questions.option_b: Common misconception regarding chest X‑ray interpretation
questions.option_c: Correct statement consistent with chest X‑ray interpretation
questions.option_d: Incorrect mechanism or association for chest X‑ray interpretation
questions.explanation: The correct answer reflects standard undergraduate medical/dental knowledge for chest X‑ray interpretation.
